summary: Phase 10: Weather Trading Strategy - Full integration testing complete. 26/26 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Weather page renders correctly with 7 stat cards, 5 tabs, and 6 health sections. Empty states render safely when engine is idle.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/health - returns healthy status with engine=stopped, mode=paper
GET /api/strategies/weather/health - returns health data with total_scans, running, feed_health, config, calibration_status, stations (8)
GET /api/strategies/weather/config - returns enabled + all WeatherConfig fields (scan_interval, min_edge_bps, kelly_scale, etc.)
GET /api/strategies/weather/stations - returns 8 stations with station_id, city, latitude, longitude, timezone
GET /api/strategies/weather/forecasts - returns empty dict when no markets classified
GET /api/config/strategies - includes weather_trader key with enabled=true and all config fields
Regression: GET /api/config includes weather_trader in strategy_configs
frontend_ui_tests: Weather page loads at /weather with data-testid='weather-page'
7 stat cards rendered (Markets, Tradable, Rejected, Executed, Filled, Forecasts, Scan Latency)
5 tabs present (Signals, Rejected, Executions, Forecasts, Health)
Health tab shows 6 sections: Calibration, Scanner Metrics, Feed Health, Rejection Reasons, Strategy Config, Classified Markets
Calibration section shows 'Default NWS MOS Table' and 'Not Available' for historical
Calibration section displays sigma table by lead time (0-24h: 1.8F, 24-48h: 2.7F, etc.)
Sidebar nav shows Weather link with CloudSun icon between Sniper and Positions
Empty states render correctly: 'No tradable weather signals', 'No rejected signals', 'No weather executions yet', 'No forecasts cached', 'No weather markets classified', 'No rejections yet'

seed_data_creation: None needed - testing idle state with no weather markets
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 10 Weather Trading Strategy complete. KEY FEATURES: (1) 7 weather API endpoints: /strategies/weather/health, /signals, /executions, /forecasts, /config, /stations, and weather_trader in /config/strategies. (2) Weather page at /weather with 7 stat cards and 5 tabs. (3) Health tab has 6 sections showing calibration status (Default NWS MOS Table), scanner metrics, feed health, rejection reasons, strategy config (14 params), classified markets. (4) 8 stations configured: KNYC, KLAX, KORD, KDFW, KDEN, KJFK, KBOS, KPHL. (5) All empty states render safely when engine idle. (6) Sidebar nav correctly positioned Weather between Sniper and Positions. (7) No mocked APIs - Open-Meteo/NWS only called when engine runs with weather markets.
